items.claim: Anna struggles to get back to her feet once she is taken down.
items.quote: She can get controlled. She can struggle to get right back up

items.claim: Daiane Barbosa is prone to carelessness that leads to point deductions.
items.quote: That type of carelessness can cost fights.

items.claim: Alvin Hinds has a solid chin and good durability.
Alvin Hinds gets tagged too frequently in his fights.
items.quote: Can get tagged way too much though.

items.claim: RJ Harris is a tall fighter who relies on a standing guillotine.
items.quote: He can find that standing guillotine because of how tall he is.

items.claim: Aldin Coria is defensively sound at the end of his striking combinations.
items.quote: ends his combinations very defensively sound.

items.claim: Stewart Nicoll is susceptible to getting hit too often.
items.quote: He can get hit way more often than I like him to.

items.claim: Felipe Franco has a 100% finish rate.
items.quote: Franco will be looking at grapple, 100% finish rate.

items.claim: Levi Rodrigues Jr. has real power in his hands.
items.quote: has real power in his hands

items.claim: Sokoudjou Cole has shown significant improvement in his grappling control.
items.quote: Sokoudjou Cole's control looked amazing in that fight in both of those fights.

items.claim: Jean Paul is more dangerous and has better finishing ability than Sokoudjou Cole.
items.quote: Jean Paul's more dangerous, has the finishing ability.

items.claim: Jose Aldo is vulnerable to being taken down.
items.quote: Aldo got to have good boxing, but the thing is, if he's getting taken down by Andre Fili, who's to say he's not going to get taken down by Austin Bashi.

items.claim: Austin Bashi is a grappler with a good submission game.
items.quote: Bashi's a grappler, good sub game.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan fights at a super high pace and creates scrambles.
items.quote: fighting at a super high pace.

items.claim: Alberto Montes struggles to get fights to the ground.
items.quote: Alberto might struggle to get this fight to the ground.

items.claim: Tabatha Ricci is very open to getting taken down and controlled.
items.quote: Very small and compact, and very open to getting taken down and controlled.
